notes:
A postscript printer, so works fine.
Std 2M is okay, but you should add more.
Holds up to 66Mb, takes standard 72pin SIMM.
Also speaks PCL5e, PCL 6.
PS must be enabled as factory
settings set PCL emulation.
The Lexmark URL is for the Optra E312; the E310 doesn't officially exist any longer (but still works great!).

Consumables/Refills: 5000 sheets per cartridge
